top_signals.title: US-Iran Deal Details Emerge in 14-Point Memorandum | The Pulse 6/17/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Tanuja Randery, Amazon Web Services Vice President and EMEA Managing Director; Stefan Hoops, DWS CEO; Nadia Calviño, European Investment Bank President (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Government publishes Terms of Reference for Wholesale Digital Markets Champion
top_signals.summary: Government has today (16 June) set out in further detail what Chris Woolard will focus on and deliver.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Manipal Hospitals Is Said to Plan $1 Billion India IPO in July
top_signals.summary: Manipal Health Enterprises Pvt., which runs the Manipal Hospitals chain, is likely to launch its initial public offering as early as next month, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch
top_signals.summary: Rivian said Tuesday it was laying off hundreds of workers, or less than 2% of its workforce.
